description: Machine-readable next-task queue derived from canonical roadmap sources and current agent lanes.

verification-ready.description: Runnable now in the current local environment without hardware-only or CI-only prerequisites.

live-validation-only.description: Do not promote from this bucket without fresh machine-readable artifacts from a real NIC, real endpoint, or CI identity-backed environment.

blocked-horizon-2.description: Do not start implementation; keep at RFC or freeze status until release-gate blockers are re-evaluated.
